creator: mvharding@gmail.com
text: I've been using Poudriere for a while to update ports on my 12.1 machine. Recently X stopped working so I dropped back to the 2020Q3 branch, which works. I built the 2020Q4 branch and X fails to work properly. This also occurs on a virtualbox instance, you might want to do a Gnome 3 setup on a Virtualbox instance of 12.1 before releasing 2020Q4.
